offer: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient maintenance scheduling causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide automated diagnostics monitoring instead of manual tracking of vehicle maintenance schedules.
problem: Inefficient vehicle maintenance scheduling leading to unexpected breakdowns.
